title: Privacy Policy
content:
Christiano Vincenti Property Management ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your personal information in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) (EU) 2016/679, the Maltese Data Protection Act (Cap. 586), and all applicable data protection legislation.

1. DATA CONTROLLER
Christiano Vincenti Property Management, Malta. For data protection enquiries, contact us at info@christianopm.com.

2. WHAT DATA WE COLLECT
We may collect and process the following personal data: full name, email address, phone number, property address and details (for owners), booking and stay information (for guests), payment details processed via our secure payment provider, IP address, browser type, and cookies as described in our Cookie Policy, and communication records including emails, messages, and call logs.

3. HOW WE USE YOUR DATA
We process your personal data for the following purposes: to provide and manage property management services, to process bookings and reservations, to communicate with property owners regarding their listings and earnings, to respond to enquiries submitted through our website, to comply with legal obligations including Malta Tourism Authority (MTA) regulations, to improve our website and services through analytics, and to send marketing communications where you have given consent.

4. LEGAL BASIS FOR PROCESSING
We rely on the following legal bases under GDPR Article 6: performance of a contract (managing your property or booking), legitimate interests (improving our services, preventing fraud), legal obligation (MTA compliance, tax reporting), and consent (marketing communications, non-essential cookies).

5. DATA SHARING
We may share your data with booking platforms (Airbnb, Booking.com, Guesty) as required to manage listings, cleaning and maintenance contractors (limited to necessary details), payment processors (Stripe), professional advisors (accountants, lawyers), and regulatory authorities when legally required. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

6. DATA RETENTION
We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected. Property owner data is retained for the duration of our management agreement plus 7 years for tax compliance. Guest booking data is retained for 5 years. Marketing consent records are retained until you withdraw consent. Enquiry data is retained for 2 years.

7. YOUR RIGHTS
Under GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, request erasure ('right to be forgotten'), restrict or object to processing, data portability, withdraw consent at any time, and lodge a complaint with the Information and Data Protection Commissioner (IDPC) Malta.

8. INTERNATIONAL TRANSFERS
Your data may be transferred to countries outside the EEA where our service providers operate (e.g., Guesty, Stripe). Such transfers are protected by EU Standard Contractual Clauses or adequacy decisions.

9. DATA SECURITY
We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including encrypted transmission (TLS/SSL), access controls and authentication, regular security assessments, and secure data storage with backup procedures.

10. CHANGES TO THIS POLICY
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified via email or prominent notice on our website.

11. CONTACT US
For privacy-related enquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at info@christianopm.com.
